title: MODERATE: useDirection silently returns 'ltr' instead of throwing on missing provider
description: M1: src/components/ui/direction.tsx:23-29 — `useDirection()` silently defaults to 'ltr' when no DirectionProvider is in the tree. Contrast with `useSidebar()` which correctly throws an error. This hides provider bugs and makes debugging harder.
resolution: Changed DirectionContext default to undefined, useDirection now throws error on missing provider
